rules.hint: This looks like a new feature request. Start with /brainstorming for spec-driven flow (HARD-GATE design before code). If this is a small change, ignore this hint.
This looks like a bug fix. Use /bugfix for the 4-phase Report → Analyze → Fix → Verify workflow. If this is a tiny one-line fix, ignore this hint.

This looks like a document task. Use /write-document for the document-specific 5-phase flow (spec → structure → tasks → drafting cycle → final review). If this is a small README edit, ignore this hint.
Sounds like planning. Use /writing-plans (Superpowers) after spec is done.
